## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests updated or added
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `python -m build` passes

## Protocol Impact

- [ ] No public protocol or verification behavior changed
- [ ] Public protocol or verification behavior changed and RIP docs/tests were updated

## Security Review

- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or internal operational details were added
